summary: Admin customers page shows proper success state with customer data table, search controls, and actions, but violates brand palette consistency by using dark neutral UI instead of the required diner aesthetic.

violations.description: Page uses dark neutral palette (#1a1a1a background, gray surfaces) instead of required diner palette - authenticated surfaces must share coherent brand palette with public routes per postmortem rule
Admin interface uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces - primary canvas should use teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea, not dark neutrals

actions: Apply diner palette to admin interface - replace dark background with teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea
Update admin table and card surfaces to use cream #fff8ea instead of gray neutrals
Ensure primary ink color uses #1f1b18 for text and borders
Maintain current functional layout and controls while applying brand-consistent colors
